text: Standing before this wall of ideas—R+D, Responsive and rapidly evolving Development—I feel a kind of intellectual alertness. The words around me, glowing and authoritative, provoke questions about how we connect and coexist with technology. There is a tension here: the drive to innovate alongside the looming possible disconnect from human nuance. I am both inspired and slightly unsettled, aware of being watched by silent screens, reminded that interpretation always lags behind pure intention. This space is electric with the friction between progress and understanding.
